message:
Include OCSF reference in docs map and auto-stub variables

Add OCSF sidebar to the generated docs map when sidebar-ocsf.generated.ts
exists. Replace hardcoded variable stubs with dynamic extraction from
sidebar.ts imports and declarations to handle future changes without
manual updates. Distinguish between missing file and parse errors in
error handling.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Haiku 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
